message:
test(ftui-style): add 24 proptest invariants for color, WCAG contrast, and gradients

Property tests cover: luminance bounds, contrast ratio symmetry/bounds,
rgb_to_256 round-trip stability, downgrade idempotency/monotonicity,
Rgb::as_key injectivity, ColorCache consistency, gradient sampling,
and best_text_color correctness.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
